_comment: Golden fixture for the getDiagnostics agent format (FR-026 / SC-008). Each case feeds one LSP Diagnostic for a vault-relative path and asserts the rendered GCC/Clang line `<path>:<line>:<col>: <severity>: <message>`. This is OUR documented format (the GCC/Clang convention) per contracts/getdiagnostics-parity.md — not any editor's private rendering, so nothing is captured/guessed. LSP positions are 0-based; rendered line/col are 1-based UTF-16 units.

cases.name: hint
cases.expected: main.go:3:3: hint: exported function should have comment

cases.name: multi-line message collapsed to one line

diagnostic.message:
type mismatch:
  expected Integer
  got String

cases.expected: y.rb:7:1: error: type mismatch: expected Integer got String

cases.name: column after multibyte (Cyrillic) text is UTF-16 1-based (SC-007)
column after emoji (surrogate pair counts as 2 units)
